title: Elliott Wooden Hand Scrubbing Brush with stiff natural Bassine bristles, heavy duty multipurpose and water resistant, made with natural fibres easy to use and long lasting
features: NATURAL HARDWOOD SCRUBBING BRUSH: Curved Wood stock so comfortable to hold with all natural fibres, no plastic
HARD-WEARING FIBRES: Made with Stiff Bassine Bristles that will perform a deep clean for either indoor or outdoor tasks
HANDY SIZE: Measuring 20cm long and up to 8cm wide this scrubbing brush fits firmly in the hand so that strong pressure can be applied when cleaning
TRIED AND TESTED: The most efficient and useful cleaning tool for cleaning in and around the home
ELLIOTT’s has an extensive range of everyday essential cleaning products for indoor and outdoor, A trusted and well-known brand for cleaning and laundry products
description: From the brand Previous page Elliott is a British cleaning brand with over 65 years of experience. Founded in 1948, we began with traditional brushware, including scrubbing brushes for floors and stairs. Today, we offer stylish, efficient products for modern households, helping you achieve a spotless home. Laundry Pegs Clothes Lines Wooden Brushes Spray Bottles Dustpan and Brushes Dusters Brooms Wooden Broom Heads Window Squeeges Toilet Brushes and Plungers Next page
